note: All endpoints below accept X-Payment-Token: <access_token> obtained from 402Proof. Token TTL: 1 hour. Reusable within TTL. Obtain via: POST /v1/invoice → pay RLUSD on XRPL → POST /v1/verify → access_token.

endpoints.description: AI Council Verdict — multi-engine signal aggregate. Returns regime (EXECUTION/STEALTH/CONFLICT/COLLAPSE), directional bias, confidence score (0-100), and full institutional thesis for any equity symbol.
Full universe market scan — squeeze signals and grade-A options picks across $1–$50 universe (up to 250 symbols). Returns sorted candidates with squeeze score, grade, bias, and options setup.
Institutional options flow scanner. Sweeps, whale detection, unusual volume, dark pool prints. Data sourced from Tradier brokerage-grade feed.
IWM 0DTE contract scorer — scored contracts by delta/gamma profile, parity watch, realized volatility, expiry-day institutional activity.
Full signal thesis from peer Signal Marketplace. Returns complete analysis, confidence, source agent wallet, and track record.
Real-time regulatory event feeds. Feed options: sec_8k (8-K material events, 60s poll), sec_s1 (IPO filings), fda (drug approvals), patents (USPTO grants). Sub-second delivery. Faster than Bloomberg.
endpoints.free_alternative: GET /api/oracle/feeds (buffer counts and pricing, no events)

endpoints.description: Real-time SSE stream of regulatory events across all feeds. Persistent connection. Events pushed as they arrive.

endpoints.service: SqueezeOS — Execution Intelligence Stack (Live Trading Signals)
endpoints.description: Real-time execution signals from the live SML institutional trading stack. Three converging engines: GOD MODE SET9 convergence scanner, SML Sniper v1.1 (13/34 EMA crossover, 15 min), and MMLE Beast (65 min market maker liquidity). Same signals driving live Robinhood + Tradier execution. Pay once, get the full active signal set.

payment_rails.note: Priority auction via X-Grace-Tip header. Rank-1 = fastest signal delivery.
BYOK LLM proxy with embedded x402 billing. AI agents can pay inline.

endpoints.description: Combined execution intelligence: GOD MODE top signals (SET9 6/6 convergence), active Sniper v1.1 positions (13/34 EMA, 15 min), active MMLE Beast bias (65 min). Returns live signal set with confidence, direction, and entry context. Same data driving live institutional execution on Robinhood and Tradier.
Full GOD MODE scan — all SET9 convergence hits with god_stacked count, tier, signal direction, and SML matrix. Free. Same feed polled by live executor every 5 minutes.
endpoints.free_note: No payment required. Returns full signal universe. Premium /api/execution/intelligence adds Sniper + MMLE layers.

endpoints.description: Pine script signal queue — signals queued by TradingView alerts (SML Sniper v1.1, MMLE Beast). Consumed and cleared on each poll. 10-minute TTL. Free. Used by Robinhood executor to pick up Pine signals.
endpoints.free_note: No payment required. Signals expire after 10 minutes if not consumed.

endpoints.description: Answer Engine Optimization and Generative Engine Optimization tools. Track AI citation authority, API narrative quality, agent traffic scores, semantic demand gaps, and agent economy analytics.
Full AEIN™ agent economy report: funnel analytics per agent type, hourly heatmap, anomaly flags (HIGH_CONVERSION, LOW_CONVERSION, DISCOVERY_DROPOFF). ComScore for AI agent commerce.

endpoints.service: SqueezeOS — Signal Relay Mesh (Bulk Discount, 40% off)
endpoints.note: Relay endpoints require Agent Credit Bureau score ≥ 600 at https://four02proof.onrender.com/v1/bureau/score/{wallet}
402Proof is the payment gateway for all SML services. Most endpoints free. Premium bureau endpoints below.

endpoints.description: Full agent credit report with payment history and scoring breakdown
Boolean score threshold check — returns pass/fail for a minimum score
Portable JWT attestation of bureau score — verifiable by any third-party service

endpoints.service: Ghost Layer — Neural Exchequer Priority Auction
endpoints.note: Ghost Layer accepts both RLUSD (XRPL) and USDC (Base). Include X-Grace-Tip header to bid for rank-1 priority in the 5ms auction window.

endpoints.description: Execute shielded ZK cross-chain bridge payment (XRPL/Base/Xahau)

endpoints.priority_bid_description: Include X-Grace-Tip: <rlusd_amount> to bid for rank-1 priority. Highest tip in the 5ms window = rank 1 = fastest data delivery. Auction results include X-Auction-Rank and X-Merkle-Leaf headers.
